title: T Gates and Universal Quantum Computation
description: Master the theory of universal gate sets, T gate synthesis, and the Solovay-Kitaev theorem for fault-tolerant quantum computation.
learningObjectives: Explain why T gates are essential for universal quantum computation
Understand the Clifford+T gate set and its universality properties
Apply the Solovay-Kitaev theorem for gate approximation
Implement T gate synthesis algorithms for arbitrary rotations
Analyze the T-count complexity of quantum circuits
